benefits.description: GHRP-2 (or GHRP-6) for appetite stimulation in old dog
LL-37 for immune system support in old dog
Dog lived to 17 despite breed average life expectancy of 11-13 years

protocol_notes: User gave old dog peptides (GHRP-2 or GHRP-6 for appetite stimulation, LL-37 for immune system). Dog lived to 17 years old, exceeding breed average life expectancy of 11-13 years. Also mentions mixing water soluble compounds (lipo-b, l-carnitine, taurine) with oil-based compounds (coq10, vitamin d) and that lab levels show they're working.
